prompt: Review this design for me. It's a dark-mode SaaS landing page with: a hero section using 64px Space Grotesk headline on #0A0A0A background with #E8E8E8 text, 18px DM Sans subhead in #888888, a #4F46E5 CTA button with 12px border-radius. Below is a features grid with 3 cards at 32px padding, #141414 background, 16px border-radius, 1px border at rgba(255,255,255,0.06). Section spacing is 96px. All spacing is on 8px grid. Contrast ratios all pass AA.

assertions.text: Report includes separate grades for typography, color, spacing, layout, and polish
Overall grade is A or B (the described design follows best practices)
